description_en: Buenos Aires may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 29 halal restaurants and 7 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Buenos Aires, Argentina, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Buenos Aires: 33 halal restaurants listed, 7 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
